This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-pqh6-8fxf-jx22. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
phpMyFAQ before 4.1.2 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in search.twig where result.question and result.answerPreview are rendered with the raw filter, disabling autoescape protection. Attackers with FAQ editor privileges can inject HTML-entity-encoded payloads that bypass html_entity_decode(strip_tags()) processing in SearchController.php, executing arbitrary JavaScript in every visitor's browser context including administrators.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-478m-mrw4-qf2w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-09T00:02:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-478m-mrw4-qf2w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-478m-mrw4-qf2w"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T19:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T21:31:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/thorsten/phpMyFAQ/security/advisories/GHSA-pqh6-8fxf-jx22", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46361", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/phpmyfaq-stored-cross-site-scripting-via-raw-filter-in-search-twig", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-478m-mrw4-qf2w"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ has stored XSS via | raw Filter in search.twig — html_entity_decode(strip_tags()) Bypass in Search Result Rendering", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T00:02:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-478m-mrw4-qf2w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "thorsten/phpmyfaq"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "phpmyfaq/phpmyfaq"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-09T00:02:53Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ has stored XSS via | raw Filter in search.twig — html_entity_decode(strip_tags()) Bypass in Search Result Rendering
